text:
Do not use any operators or functions other than addition (+) and subtraction (-).
<answer>97+62-32-2 </answer>
Note: The order of the numbers does not matter. <answer>(24*36)-83+10 </answer>
Note: The order of the numbers does not matter. <answer>(75 - 71) + 55 - 66 </answer>
Note: The order of the numbers does not matter. <answer>(59 * 61) - 73 - 12 </answer>
Note: The order of the numbers does not matter. <answer>(26 + 68) + 12 * 3 </answer>
Note: The order of the numbers does not matter. <answer>(21+37)*89-105</answer>
Note: The order of the numbers does not matter. <answer>(12 * 26) + 50 * 97</answer>
Note: The order of the numbers does not matter. <answer>(38 + 74 + 42) * 75 - 75</answer>
